---
title: "SCDMS Workflow & Role Validation Workshop"
subtitle: "Commission Decision Management System (v1.0)"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
    self-contained: true
---

## 1. Executive Summary

This document outlines the current workflow implementation within the **Commission Decision Management System (SCDMS)**. It serves as a validation reference for the upcoming workshop to ensure the digital implementation aligns with the Public Service Commission (PSC) Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs).

## 2. System Workflow Overview

The SCDMS digitises the lifecycle of a submission from initial drafting by a Ministry through to Commission deliberation and final implementation tracking.

### 2.1 Full Lifecycle Workflow (Mermaid)

```{mermaid}
flowchart TB
    subgraph PreSubmission["Pre‑Submission & Intake"]
        DRAFT["Draft"] --> SUB["Submitted to PSC"]
        SUB --> REC["Received by PSC"]
        REC --> REG["Registered & Routed"]
    end
    subgraph Assessment["Assessment Pipeline"]
        REG --> MCR["Manager Checklist Review"]
        MCR --> UA["Under Assessment (21‑day)"]
        UA -->|"Clarification needed"| RFC["Returned for Clarification"]
        RFC --> SUB
        UA -->|"Legal advice"| ALA["Awaiting Legal Advice"]
        ALA --> UA
    end
    subgraph Commission["Commission Deliberation"]
        UA --> FTC["Forwarded to Commission"]
        FTC --> CS["Commission Sitting"]
        CS -->|"Defer to later meeting"| TAB["Tabled"]
        TAB -->|"Next meeting"| CS
    end
    subgraph Outcomes["Outcomes & Post‑Decision"]
        CS --> APP["Approved"]
        CS --> REJ["Rejected"]
        CS -->|"New: shortcut"| MA["Matters Arising"]
        CS --> DHR["Deferred Back to HR"]
        DHR -->|"Full pipeline"| SUB
        DHR -->|"New: shortcut"| MA
        MA --> CS
        APP --> MDS["Minutes Drafted & Signed"]
        REJ --> MDS
        MDS --> DEA["Decision Entered & Assigned"]
        DEA --> UI["Under Implementation"]
        UI --> IR["Implementation Report"]
    end
    DRAFT:::pregray
    SUB:::preblue
    REC:::preblue
    REG:::preindigo
    MCR:::preindigo
    UA:::previolet
    RFC:::preorange
    ALA:::preamber
    FTC:::prepurple
    CS:::prepurple
    TAB:::preamber
    APP:::preemerald
    REJ:::prered
    MA:::prepurple
    DHR:::preorange
    MDS:::preteal
    DEA:::preteal
    UI:::pregreen
    IR:::pregreen
    classDef pregray fill:#e2e8f0,stroke:#94a3b8,color:#475569
    classDef preblue fill:#dbeafe,stroke:#60a5fa,color:#1e40af
    classDef preindigo fill:#e0e7ff,stroke:#818cf8,color:#3730a3
    classDef previolet fill:#ede9fe,stroke:#a78bfa,color:#4c1d95
    classDef preorange fill:#ffedd5,stroke:#fb923c,color:#9a3412
    classDef preamber fill:#fef3c7,stroke:#fbbf24,color:#92400e
    classDef prepurple fill:#f3e8ff,stroke:#c084fc,color:#581c87
    classDef preemerald fill:#d1fae5,stroke:#34d399,color:#065f46
    classDef prered fill:#fee2e2,stroke:#f87171,color:#991b1b
    classDef preteal fill:#ccfbf1,stroke:#2dd4bf,color:#115e59
    classDef pregreen fill:#dcfce7,stroke:#4ade80,color:#166534
```

## 3. Roles and Responsibilities (RBAC)

The system implements a strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) model as defined in `rbac.py` and `transitions.py`.

### 3.1 Role Privileges and Constraints

| Role Group | Role Name | Primary Responsibility | Critical System Constraint |
|------------|-----------|------------------------|---------------------------|
| **Ministry** | Ministry HR Officer | Drafts and submits cases. | Cannot transition items out of Intake/Assessment. |
| | Head of Agency (DG) | Review and Endorsement. | **SOP Sec 6**: DG sign-off mandatory for submission. |
| **Intake** | PSC Secretary | Meeting & Agenda Management. | Cannot record Approved/Rejected decisions. |
| | Senior Admin Officer| Registration & Logistics. | Handles initial routing and queue management. |
| **Review** | OPSC Unit Manager | Checklist Review. | **Restricted**: Can only act at Checklist Review stage. |
| **Assessment**| PSC Officer | Technical Assessment. | **Forbidden**: Cannot access Commission decision stages. |
| **Commission**| PSC Commissioner | Deliberation & Decision. | Can only act at Sitting or Hold states. |
| | Chairperson | Sign-off & Chairing. | Signs Minutes using Electronic PIN/Signature. |
| **Execution** | OPSC Manager | Task Allocation. | Restricted to post-decision execution stages. |
| | Principal/Senior Off.| Task Execution. | Can only update Implementation status/reports. |

## 4. SOP & Transition Guardrails

The system enforces SOP alignment through its **Transition Engine**. Every movement between stages is validated against the user's role and the current state of the submission.

### 4.1 Automated Validation Rules
- **Assessment Timer**: Auto-starts the 21-day countdown upon entering `UNDER_ASSESSMENT`.
- **Intake Blocking**: Submissions cannot be registered until Received by PSC.
- **Decision Locking**: Approved/Rejected decisions can ONLY be recorded by the Chairperson or a Commissioner while a meeting is in session.
- **Sign-off Enforcement**: Tasks for OPSC staff cannot be created until the Chairperson has electronically signed the official Minutes.

## 5. Post-Decision Action Tracking

The system transitions from "Submission Tracking" to "Task Tracking" once a decision is finalised.

### 5.1 The Task Hierarchy
1. **Parent Task**: Allocated by the OPSC Manager to a unit (e.g., "Implement Recruitment of Director").
2. **Sub-Tasks**: Granular steps (e.g., "Draft Gazette Notice", "Notify Candidate") with individual due dates.
3. **Audit Trail**: Every update from staff is logged, providing a real-time implementation report for the next Commission sitting.

## 6. Reports & Data Extraction

SCDMS provides several audit-ready extraction points:
- **KPI Dashboards**: Visualising turnaround times vs. the 21-day SLA.
- **Audit Logs**: Tamper-evident record of every login, stage transition, and data change.
- **Minutes PDF**: Formally formatted minutes with embedded digital signatures.

## 7. Interactive Tools for Workshop

Two interactive resources are available for today's session:

1. **Workflow Explorer (`workflow-explorer.html`)**: A drill-down SVG diagram to explore every possible path and role responsibility.
2. **Demo Scenario (`demo-scenario.qmd`)**: A live walkthrough of a "Restructure Proposal" from start to finish.

## 8. Practical Demo Scenario

This scenario follows a "Restructure Proposal" through the entire lifecycle, demonstrating:
- **Simulated Microsoft Authenticator Push**: A modern 2FA experience for the Commission.
- **Head of Agency endorsement**: Demonstrating cross-ministry workflow.
- **Automated deadline calculation**: Real-time SLA tracking.
- **Chairperson's electronic signature**: Secure decision finalization.
- **Task allocation blocking**: Process integrity enforcement.

---
**Prepared for:** SCDMS Validation Workshop  
**System Version:** 1.0.0-rc  
**Date:** 13 May 2026
